title: 7 OpenSSL Commands for Certs and Secrets
summary: Handle common TLS and secret tasks faster with OpenSSL commands for random keys, file hashes, certificate inspection, live HTTPS checks, CSRs, and file encryption.
verification_setup: Replace the example host and file names before running the commands.
Run file-writing commands from a writable directory.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/openssl_commands_for_certs_and_secrets.sh with real hosts and local files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example hosts and file names; some commands also require local certificates, writable paths, or passphrase input.
